prompt:
Use the uploaded portrait as the identity reference only. Preserve the subject’s real face shape, facial features, skin tone, and hairstyle. Do not copy the original portrait’s clothes, background, pose, lighting, or image quality.

Create a realistic vertical 9:16 night street reflection selfie. The subject is seen through a glass window reflection, holding a smartphone in front of part of the face, wearing a simple dark outfit. Soft messy hair moved slightly by wind. Behind the glass, a bright 24H MART or subway-station shop appears heavily blurred with horizontal motion streaks, creating a cinematic long-exposure feeling. Moody cool-toned lighting, soft haze, glass reflections, subtle smudges, realistic shadows, natural skin texture, authentic phone-shot atmosphere, slightly melancholic urban mood. Any visible signs should be simple English text such as "ROSE", no Chinese characters.
